text.title: Agency Cash-Flow Friday Routine Core Rules

rule.statement: Routine MUST complete in 15 minutes wall-clock; longer rituals are rejected.
Checklist MUST cover exactly the 5 items: AR>30d, AP due 14d coverage, payroll 30d, fixed costs, runway months.
rule.rationale: Five items capture cash-death modes for micro-agencies; more dilute focus.

rule.statement: Any amber item MUST have a named action with owner before the Friday slot ends; deferred actions rejected.
rule.rationale: Deferred actions accumulate into a crisis.

rule.statement: Each Friday MUST produce a one-line ledger entry committed to a version-controlled file.
rule.rationale: Without the entry, the routine vanishes and runway becomes folklore.

rule.statement: Runway < 3 months MUST trigger contingency plan (escalate to advisor / pause hiring).
rule.rationale: Runway < 3m is the agency-death-zone; auto-escalation prevents denial.
